step_rationale: BCAA catabolism activator; regulates thrombosis risk via BCAA metabolism.
mechanism: PP2Cm activates branched-chain amino acid catabolism, altering amino-acid-driven signaling that modulates platelet activation and thrombotic risk.

references.title: Branched-Chain Amino Acid Catabolism Promotes Thrombosis Risk by Enhancing Tropomodulin-3 Propionylation in Platelets.
